description: Composition Pink and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with three-quarter sleeves and ethnic traditional print, Pink piping with stone embellishments around the neck, decoration on the chest, pink piping on the cuffs, pin tucks on either sides of the chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print coupled with pretty piping and pin tucks are sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
